title: DELILA-Rust EB runtime config (eb_config.json)
description: Defines the timing windows, L1 trigger recognition (named-ops), L2 event filter, and output destination for the Event Builder. See TODO/event-builder/SPECIFICATION.md (v0.7+) for the full reference. Add `"$schema": "path/to/eb_config.schema.json"` to the top of your config to enable editor autocomplete and validation.

$schema.description: Optional reference back to this schema (editor hint).

version.description: Schema version of this file. Use "1.0".

channels_file.description: Path (relative to this file) to chSettings.json. Provides Tags and energy calibration per channel.

time_offsets_file.description: Path (relative to this file) to timeSettings.json (tree form preferred; legacy single-ref form is also accepted).

l2.description: Ordered list of L2 ops (named-ops AST). Lines forming a Counter→Flag→Accept chain are evaluated top-to-bottom. The event is kept iff at least one `accept` op evaluates to true.

TimingConfig.description: Timing windows used by chunk_builder and the sorter.

coincidence_window_ns.description: Trigger ±window in nanoseconds. Hits within this distance of an L1 anchor are pulled into the event. Typical: 100–500.

buffer_delay_ns.description: Time-sort buffer depth in ns. Absorbs arrival jitter. Typical: 1e9 (1 second).

slice_duration_ns.description: Time slice length in ns for the chunk-based pipeline. Must be > coincidence_window_ns. Typical: 1e7 (10 ms).

L1Config.description: L1 trigger recognition: a DAG of named ops, with `trigger` pointing at the root.

definitions.description: Named L1 ops. Each must have a unique `name`. Downstream ops reference upstream ops by name. Evaluation respects topological order (cycles are rejected at load).

trigger.description: Name of the op whose truth value triggers event construction at each hit.

L1OpChannel.title: channel
L1OpChannel.description: Marks one (module, channel) hit as a trigger candidate. This is the leaf op — every other L1 op resolves down to channels.

L1OpModule.title: module
L1OpModule.description: Syntactic sugar — expands to every (module, c) for c in 0..channels. Useful when a digitizer has 16/32/64 channels and you want 'any hit in this module' without enumerating each channel by hand. Equivalent to an `or` over `channels` individual `channel` ops. Can also be used as input to `or` / `and` / `multiplicity` (multiplicity over a module op = 'any N of M's channels').

module.description: Module number; all channels 0..channels-1 of this module become triggers.

channels.description: Number of channels in this module. Op expands to channels 0..channels-1.

L1OpOr.title: or
L1OpOr.description: Logical OR: this op fires when any of `inputs` fires.

items.description: Name of an upstream L1 op.

L1OpAnd.title: and
L1OpAnd.description: All `inputs` fire within `window_ns`. Lowered to a Multiplicity with min == |inputs|. MVP restriction: inputs must resolve to leaf `channel` ops.

items.description: Name of an upstream L1 `channel` op.

L1OpMultiplicity.title: multiplicity
L1OpMultiplicity.description: Fires when `min` distinct channels from `channels` fire within `window_ns` (sliding window). MVP restriction: channels must resolve to leaf `channel` ops.

items.description: Name of an upstream L1 `channel` op.

L2OpCounter.title: counter
L2OpCounter.description: Count event hits whose channel Tags intersect the given tag set. Tags come from chSettings.json. The counter's `name` becomes a ROOT TTree branch in the output (one i64 value per event).

name.description: Counter op name — also used as the ROOT TTree branch name in the output. Must match [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]* (no `-`, `.`, spaces, leading digit) because ROOT branch names can't contain operator characters.

items.description: Tag string as defined in chSettings.json `Tags`.

L2OpFlag.title: flag
L2OpFlag.description: Compare a `counter` (or another `flag`) result against `value` with `operator`. Produces a boolean.

L2OpAccept.title: accept
L2OpAccept.description: Combine `flag` results with AND/OR. If any `accept` in the L2 chain evaluates to true, the event is kept.

L2OpEnergyGate.title: energy_gate
L2OpEnergyGate.description: Per-(module, channel) energy gate. Fires when at least one event hit on this channel has energy in [min_adc, max_adc]. The result is exposed as a `flag` of the same name (downstream ops reference it via `monitor`).

L2OpAcVeto.title: ac_veto
L2OpAcVeto.description: Fires when any `trigger_channels` hit has a `veto_channels` hit within ±window_ns. Result is a `flag` named after this op (true means VETOED). To drop vetoed events, chain a `flag` with `operator: "==", value: 0` to invert and then `accept` it.

L2OpMinHits.title: min_hits
L2OpMinHits.description: Fires when the event has at least `min` hits.

events_per_file.description: Roll over to a new ROOT file every N events.

directory.description: Where ROOT output files are written (created if missing).

zmq_pub_endpoint.description: Optional ZMQ PUB endpoint for the live BuiltEvent stream (SPEC § 9.3). Set to null (or omit) to disable.
